title: Kubernetes Security Scanning: The 4 Tools You Actually Need

resources.title: Spectro Cloud Palette
resources.evidence_quote: At the end of this video, you will see a demo with Spectral Cloud, where I turn on all of my day two secondurity scanning operations with a toggle box.

resources.title: Google Microservices Demo
resources.evidence_quote: This is just using a Docker desktop with the Google microservices demo deployed.

resources.title: CIS Kubernetes Benchmarks
resources.evidence_quote: It checks the cluster against the SIS benchmarks, which is basically the global rule book if one were to exist for hardening Kubernetes.
